title: dendrobium parvulum subsp. huliorum
intro: Dendrobium parvulum subsp. huliorum, also known as the Hulio endemic Dendrobium, is a rare orchid species endemic to the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its extracts. The health benefits of Dendrobium parvulum subsp. huliorum include its potential to alleviate fever, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for various herbal applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
